mechanism_narrative: Higher federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate hikes are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment crossing above 4.0 percent signals labor market deterioration that reduces household income growth, triggering corporate earnings downgrades and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or out-of-sample hit rate falls below 45%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer demand expansion, driving corporate revenue growth and positive equity returns over quarterly horizons.
failure_condition: Joint signal produces negative 60d returns in > 55% of cases, or interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10) in panel regression.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth outpaces monetary tightening expectations, signaling resilient manufacturing capacity that supports short-term equity momentum and positive returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in > 50% of observations when INDPRO rises, or rolling IC drops below zero for consecutive quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth above historical trend directly correlates with aggregate corporate revenue expansion, generating positive forward equity returns over quarterly horizons.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show no statistical relationship with GDPC1 growth rates, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 across all rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained CPI levels above 315 trigger expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive in > 65% of periods when CPI exceeds threshold, or predictive accuracy fails to exceed random baseline in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total employment combined with falling unemployment rates confirms robust labor market absorption, boosting consumer confidence and driving positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Combined labor signal yields negative 20d returns in > 55% of cases, or interaction effect vanishes when controlling for monetary policy shocks.

mechanism_narrative: Declining retail sales alongside rising inflation indicate demand destruction under price pressures, forcing equity repricing and generating negative short-term returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in > 60% of triggered instances, or the joint signal fails to predict return direction with statistical significance (p > 0.05).
